---
title: ""
---

:::::::::::::::: hero

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# TriAnn Integrated Farm

### Quality Livestock & Crop Production

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Welcome to **TriAnn Integrated Farm**

We specialize in:

::::::::::::::: grid
::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
<a href="cattle.qmd">

:::: card
![](images/cattles/img3.jpg)

::: {.card-body style="background:#e8f5e9;"}
Diary Cattle
:::
::::

</a>
:::::

::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
<a href="pigs.qmd">

:::: card
![](images/pigs/p_img4.jpeg)

::: {.card-body style="background:#fce4ec;"}
Pig Farming
:::
::::

</a>
:::::

::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
<a href="ducks.qmd">

:::: card
![](images/ducks/d_img1.jpg)

::: {.card-body style="background:#e3f2fd;"}
Duck Farming
:::
::::

</a>
:::::

::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-3}
<a href="bananas.qmd">

:::: card
![](images/bananas/b_img4.jpeg)

::: {.card-body style="background:#fff9c4;"}
Banana Plantation
:::
::::

</a>
:::::
:::::::::::::::
::::::::::::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: footer
### TriAnn Integrated Farm

📞 Phone: +4915510230189 \
📧 Email: triannfarm\@email.com\
📍 Morogoro, Tanzania

© 2026 TriAnn Integrated Farm
:::

`<a href="https://wa.me/`{=html}4915510230189`?text=Hello%20I%20want%20to%20order%20from%20TriAnn%20Farm" class="whatsapp">`{=html} Order via WhatsApp </a>
